final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing styled smartphone photo of Korean-cafe-style coffee and desserts with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays, no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean-cafe Instagram aesthetic shot on a smartphone — exact stylistic execution is yours; annotation overlay needs a white-pen hand-drawn sketch style with rough, slightly uneven single-stroke lines tracing object outlines, arrows, and dashed guiding lines — exact line weight and sketch looseness are yours
Composition: needs an Instagram Stories / magazine rough-notes layout feel — exact framing and flat-lay vs. angled choice is yours
Subject: must include coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets as focal subjects; no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean-cafe atmosphere setting
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, fashionable yet relaxed café atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, light-toned direction fitting Korean-cafe aesthetics — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include hand-drawn Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) for each element, short diary-voice comments as follows — exact placement and handwriting style are yours:
  • 飲み物 annotation: taste / temperature / mood comment (e.g. 「さっぱり」「やさしい甘さ」)
  • 食べ物 annotation: texture / deliciousness comment (e.g. 「しっとり」「さいこう」)
  • 空間 annotation: atmosphere comment (e.g. 「ほっとする」「いい時間」)
  • 全体 annotation: one-line summary (e.g. 「しあわせすぎた〜」)
  • decorative elements: steam wisps, sparkle marks, small heart shapes, tiny emoticons — used sparingly with breathing room / 余白
Constraints: must preserve 余白 (negative space) in the annotation layer; annotations must feel like a personal diary / one-liner / emotional note, not labels; white-pen line style must trace object outlines and use arrows or dashed lines for visual guidance
Avoid: overcrowded annotations; people or human figures; overly polished digital illustration look
